basic_details.job_title: ICSI Career Consultants Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Institute of Company Secretaries of India (ICSI)
basic_details.short_information: The Institute of Company Secretaries of India (ICSI) has officially announced the Career Consultants on Retainer Basis Recruitment 2026 with multiple openings. The detailed notification was published on 28 April 2026 at www.icsi.edu. Candidates who meet the age criteria of 21 to 35 years and hold a Graduate degree in any discipline can now submit their online applications from 28 April 2026 to 10 May 2026. Direct links to download the notification and apply online are shared below.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 21 years Maximum Age: 35 years Age relaxation may be relaxed in deserving cases based on experience and suitability, at the discretion of the competent authority.

qualification.details: Graduate in any discipline from a recognized institution. Strong communication skills. Ability to communicate in English and/or the regional language of the assigned State/district. Basic familiarity with IT tools. Experience in student mobilisation, academic counselling, or related activities shall be an added advantage.

salary_details.details: Consolidated amount of Rs. 5,000/- per month. Performance-based incentives: CS Executive Programme: Rs. 750 per registration CSEET: Rs. 250 per registration Conditions for incentives include timely submission of the Fortnightly Performance Report (FPR) and certification of satisfactory performance by the Directorate of Student Services.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the ICSI Career Consultants on Retainer Basis Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 10-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of ICSI to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the ICSI Career Consultants on Retainer Basis Recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to apply for the ICSI Career Consultants on Retainer Basis Recruitment is 10th May 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the minimum and maximum age limit for the Career Consultants post?
faq.answer: The minimum age limit for the Career Consultants post is 21 years, and the maximum age limit is 35 years. Age relaxation may be provided in deserving cases at the discretion of the competent authority.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Candidates must be a Graduate in any discipline from a recognized institution. Strong communication skills and basic IT familiarity are also essential.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Career Consultants position?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a consolidated amount of Rs. 5,000/- per month, along with performance-based incentives.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the ICSI Career Consultants on Retainer Basis posts?
faq.answer: Interested candidates must apply only through the electronic application form (online) via the provided hyperlink on the official ICSI website. The application link will be active from 28.04.2026 to 10.05.2026.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive. Candidates can apply without paying any fee.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Career Consultants role?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve an Application Review followed by a Potential Test/Interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their performance in these stages.

faq.question: Q8. Are there any performance-based incentives for the Career Consultants?
faq.answer: Yes, there are performance-based incentives. For CS Executive Programme registrations, Rs. 750 per registration is offered, and for CSEET registrations, Rs. 250 per registration is provided.

faq.question: Q9. What are the important dates for the application process?
faq.answer: The application process starts on 28th April 2026 and ends on 10th May 2026. The cut-off date for all purposes, including age and qualifications, is 1st April 2026.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF and the online application link can be found in the "Important Links" section of this article. You can also visit the official website of ICSI for more details.
